title: The Surreal Colors of the Danxia Landform

segments.text: The landscape looks like a masterpiece painted by nature.
It's located in Gansu Province, China.
These colors are due to mineral deposits over millions of years.
It's a UNESCO World Heritage Site.
Follow for places that don't feel real.

description: 📍 Danxia Landform, Gansu Province — China. A natural landscape of vibrant colors that captivates all. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
